docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO $8,803.07 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,803.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. SERVED JAN-02-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 2/7/03 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, GILBERTO
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $427.68 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $4,319.10 INTEREST, $108.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.
